name: every migrated rule is routable with a non-empty enforced_by binding
command: GCS="$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/generated-code-quality-standards" ruby -ryaml -e 'bad=0;n=0;Dir[ENV["GCS"]+"/*/*.yaml"].each{|f|d=YAML.unsafe_load_file(f) rescue next;next unless d.is_a?(Hash);(d["rules"]||[]).each{|r|next unless r.is_a?(Hash)&&r["id"];n+=1;bad+=1 unless r["enforced_by"].is_a?(Array)&&!r["enforced_by"].empty?}};STDERR.puts(bad.zero? ? "all-routable n=#{n}" : "unrouted=#{bad}");exit(bad.zero? ? 0:1)'
